description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk are glammed up with gold thread and stone detailing. The simple design is perfect for evening wear and looks great with ethnic wear. UpperStudded toe separator on the front for classic style Wide midfoot strap for added style, comfort and snug FitSoft lining for added styleLeather footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
